chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1342 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.5437/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 24.12.2025 Mr. Shamsuddin N.Kobhar, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh along with Muhammad Ali, Assistant Mukhtiarkar on behalf of Assistant Commissioner, Pano Akil >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG files statement on behalf of Respondents No.4, which are taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the petitioners. Both the parties agreed that after verification of the record of the petitioners, if the petitioners are in excess encroachment, the same shall be removed within seven days. In view of the above, Respondent No.4 / Assistant Commissioner, Pano Akil is directed to verify the record and if the petitioners are in excess area as encroachers, the same shall be removed within seven days and such compliance report be furnished to this Court through Additional Registrar. The petition is disposed of along with listed application in the above terms. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
